text:
*[Bug 18191] CMD build fails for packages providing their own VignetteEngine*
<https://bugs.r-project.org/show_bug.cgi?id=18191>

Kurt Hornik (<mailto:Kurt.Hornik@wu.ac.at|Kurt.Hornik@wu.ac.at>) changed:

           What    |Removed                     |Added
----------------------------------------------------------------------------
             Status|UNCONFIRMED                 |CLOSED
         Resolution|---                         |FIXED

--- Comment #5 from Kurt Hornik (<mailto:Kurt.Hornik@wu.ac.at|Kurt.Hornik@wu.ac.at>) ---
I just committed

r89596 | hornik | 2026-03-11 08:32:43 +0100 (Wed, 11 Mar 2026) | 1 line
Have R CMD build install packages providing their own vignette engine
(PR#18191, patch by Paul Smith).

(not sure if this also needs a NEWS entry?).

Btw, I put libdir before .libPaths().

rolled back.

text:
*[Bug 19018] The qpdf binary now seems to require filenames ending in .pdf*
<https://bugs.r-project.org/show_bug.cgi?id=19018>

--- Comment #3 from Dirk Eddelbuettel (<mailto:edd@debian.org|edd@debian.org>) ---
I just fired up a fedora container I had already pulled. Their qpdf 12.3.2
behaves like Debian too and does take a file without extension. Maybe this got
reverted upstream?

The diff, now applied, should not do harm to R but overall it appears right now
that this may just have been an Ubuntu fluke?
